examples: I stopped the tape and pressed rewind.
Leaphorn pushed the play button again, ran the tape, pushed stop, pushed rewind.
Always remember that your audiences do not have the luxury to rewind or slow down your speech.
It was tennis to stare at, to cheer for, to rewind again and again.
Here's a cute one, from a Yale student: Why doesn't Blockbuster have customers rewind before watching?
